excerpt: As of May 1, 2026, Bitcoin (BTC) leads with a $1.5T market cap, followed by Ethereum (ETH) at $273.4B, and Solana (SOL) at $48.0B. Other top cryptocurrencies include Cardano, Polkadot, and Chainlink.
